configurations.name: Rojo: Build Place Snapshot
configurations.command: powershell -NoExit -Command "if (!(Test-Path 'build')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory 'build' | Out-Null }; $env:Path += ';' + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','User'); rojo build default.project.json --output build/Place1.rbxlx"
